title: Supply Chain Manager - Container Corporation of India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Container Corporation of India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Join the Container Corporation of India family as a Supply Chain Manager in Howrah. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Container Corporation of India:
Container Corporation of India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Container Corporation of India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
